print.title: Print your flashcards
print.subtitle: Drop an Anki deck (.apkg) here. We'll make a PDF you can print or share.
print.statusUsed: Your free PDF for this month has been used.
print.statusFree: 1 free PDF this month. Subscribe for unlimited.
print.autoDelete: All files uploaded here are automatically deleted after 2 hours.
print.wrongType: This tool works with Anki deck files (.apkg). To turn notes into an Anki deck, use the Upload page.
print.corrupted: Couldn't read this file. Make sure it's a valid Anki deck (.apkg) and try again.
print.genericError: Something went wrong while generating the PDF. Try again.
print.authMessage: Log in to use PDF export.
print.upgradeMessage: Your free PDF for this month has been used.
print.makingPdfHint: Making your PDF — keep this tab open until the download starts.

import.title: Import to Notion
import.connectSubtitle: Connect Notion to import Anki decks into your workspace.
import.connectPrivacy: 2anki only creates pages where you choose. It does not read or change your existing Notion content.
import.subtitle: Turn an Anki deck into Notion toggle pages.
import.freePlanNotice: Free plan · up to 1 000 cards per import.
import.quickImportHelp: Creates a “2anki Imports” page in your Notion workspace
import.pagePickerHelp: Showing top-level pages shared with 2anki. Missing a page? Check your Notion sharing settings.
import.completedTruncated: Imported {{imported}} of {{totalNotes}} notes — import limit reached. See the note at the top of your Notion page.
import.completedToDefault: {{imported}} notes added to your “2anki Imports” page
import.partialProgress: Imported {{imported}} of {{totalNotes}} notes before something went wrong. The notes already created are still in your Notion page.
import.uploadingReassurance: Uploading images to Notion. This can take a minute for large decks.
import.progressReassurance: You can leave this page — we'll keep going in the background.
import.notAnkiDeck: This file isn't an Anki deck

photo.overLimit: Photo is over the 10 MB limit. Try a smaller image.
photo.badFormat: Use a photo format like JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or HEIC.
photo.notAvailable: Photo to deck isn't available yet.
photo.signIn: Sign in to use photo to deck.
photo.tooLarge: Photo is too large. Try a smaller or lower-resolution image.
photo.quotaReached: Free plan is {{limit}} photos per month. Upgrade for unlimited.
photo.genericReadError: Couldn't read this photo. Try again.
photo.somethingBroke: Something broke on our end. Try again in a moment.
photo.title: Photo to deck
photo.subtitle: Turn a photo of your notes, slides, or textbook into an Anki deck.
photo.generateHelper: Works on any notes, textbook pages, or slides — AI writes the questions.
photo.copyHelper: Photo already has Q&A or MCQs? Cards are copied exactly as written.
photo.dropTitle: Drop photos, paste, or click to add
photo.dropHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, HEIC — up to 10 MB each. Add as many as you need.
photo.addMoreTitle: Add more — drop, paste, or click
photo.densityHint: 3–5 for a quick pass, 6–10 for typical study, 11–20 for a dense page. Applied to each photo.
photo.showSourceImage: Show source image on the back of each card
photo.showSourceHint: Helpful for diagrams, charts, and handwritten notes.
photo.mcqPayingHint: When the source looks like a quiz, the AI writes options A–D.
photo.mcqUpgradeHint: for multiple-choice cards — A–D options when the source looks like a quiz.
photo.noQuestionsFound: No questions found in this photo.
photo.switchSuffix: to have them written for you.

occlusion.notionRefresh: Your Notion connection needs a refresh.
occlusion.notionUnreachable: We couldn't reach Notion just now.
occlusion.addImageFirst: Add at least one image first.
occlusion.drawMaskFirst: Draw at least one mask on an image.
occlusion.title: Image occlusion
occlusion.mobileBanner: Drawing is easier on a larger screen.
occlusion.subtitle: Draw boxes over areas to hide — each box becomes one flashcard.
occlusion.errorWrapper: We couldn't make your deck. {{error}} Please try again.
occlusion.uploadToStart: Upload an image from the panel on the left to start drawing.
occlusion.headerPlaceholder: Card title — shown above image on every card (optional)
occlusion.pickPagePickImages: Pick a page, pick the images
occlusion.freePlanAdded: You've added the 3 images on the free plan.
occlusion.freePlanCount: {{count}} of 3 images on the free plan
occlusion.reachNotionError: Couldn't reach Notion. Try again in a moment.
occlusion.noImagesFound: No images found in your shared pages.
occlusion.sharePageHint: Share a page with images in Notion, then come back here.
occlusion.notSharedError: Not shared with 2anki. Share this page from Notion.
occlusion.dragBoxHint: Drag a box over each area to hide.

templates.heading: Note types
templates.subtitle: Starter Anki note types you can drop in or customize. Open the .apkg in Anki to import.
templates.emptyBody: Create your first note type to use custom card layouts in Anki.
templates.startNewSubtitle: Pick a starting point. You can rename, edit, and reshape it before saving.
templates.noStarters: No starter templates available right now.
templates.blankBasicDesc: Two fields (Front, Back), one card. Sensible default styles.
templates.blankClozeDesc: Cloze deletion with a Text + Extra field. One card per cloze.
templates.describeSubtitle: Tell us what fields you want. We'll draft a starting point you can edit and preview.
templates.aiPromptPlaceholder: Japanese vocabulary — kanji, hiragana reading, English meaning, pitch-accent diagram
templates.chatEmpty: Try: “Make the back darker”, “Add a hint field”, “Use a serif font for the question.”
templates.nothingChanged: Nothing changed. Try a more specific instruction.

rules.heading: Rules
rules.subtitle: Settings for this Notion page. Block rules decide what becomes a deck or card. Card options shape the deck itself.
rules.loadError: Couldn't load rules for this page. Check your connection and try again.
rules.decksHint: Pick which Notion block types create a new deck, and which nest inside as sub-decks.
rules.decksIntro: By default, Notion pages and databases become decks. The blocks below nest inside as sub-decks.
rules.deckBoundariesHint: Notion block types that start a new deck. Defaults to page and database.
rules.advancedHint: Turn extra Notion blocks into their own decks. Most pages don't need this — pages and databases already become decks.
rules.advancedBody: Each block type you turn on splits its content into a separate deck. This changes how this page is organized in Anki. Turn one on only if you want that split.
rules.advancedWarning: Heads up — saving with these on will re-split this page into more decks the next time it converts. Turn them off to keep one deck per page.
rules.subDecksHint: Notion block types that nest inside a deck as a sub-deck.
rules.flashcardsHint: Notion blocks that become individual cards.
rules.tagsHint: How tags are detected and when 2anki emails you.
rules.tagFormatHint: The Notion styling that marks a block as a tag.
rules.emailWhenReady: Email the deck when it's ready
rules.emailHint: Sends the .apkg as an attachment for decks under 24 MB. Larger decks always email a download link.
rules.cardOptionsDescPrefix: Change the deck name, templates, and conversion for this page only.
rules.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?

mindmaps.title: Mind maps
mindmaps.subtitle: Build a map, then download it as an Anki deck.
mindmaps.monthlyLimit: Your monthly limit: 3 mind maps. Upgrade for unlimited.
mindmaps.limitHeading: You've used all 3 maps this month
mindmaps.limitSubheading: Free accounts can have 3 mind maps at a time. Upgrade for unlimited mind maps.
mindmaps.imageUploadError: Couldn't upload that image. Try again.
mindmaps.nodeLimitReached: 50 nodes reached. Upgrade to add more.
mindmaps.deleteNodeConfirm: This node has children. Delete it and all connected edges?
mindmaps.deckDownloaded: Deck downloaded — open it in Anki to start studying.
mindmaps.tapDragHint: Tap to select · drag a handle to connect
mindmaps.basicOption: Basic — one card per edge (parent → child)
mindmaps.clozeOption: Cloze — one card per path, each node clozed in sequence
mindmaps.wholeMapOption: Whole map — entire tree as one interactive card
